subcodes.first_line: O thou patient servant of the True One! According to what hath been mentioned, thou art beset with trials and tribulations, and art afflicted with disturbed circumstances [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ای بنده صابر حق از قرار مذکور مورد باساء و ضراای و مبتلای پریشانی احوال ولی
subcodes.subjects: @tests and trials; sacrifice and suffering, @consolation and comfort, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world
